normalization.notes: Store Thaana text in NFC and preserve source strings for audit. Keep vowel signs and sukun attached to base letters during segmentation review.

segmentation.pedagogical_units: base letters, obligatory vowel signs, long-vowel signs, sukun, and short word chunks
segmentation.notes: Thaana is RTL and uses combining vowel signs. Treat base-plus-mark clusters as visible teaching units while preserving raw code points for review.

sources.notes: Dhivehi exemplar and locale metadata. Confirm exact CLDR release before ingestion.

sources.notes: Useful for spelling and gloss discovery only. Do not ship copied entries.

sources.notes: Use for specialist planning around vowel signs and romanization only.
Potential validation source for island, road, and facility labels. Do not ship raw extracts.
